project.name: Q2 Mobile App Release
project.description: Mobile application development and release for Q2 2026

tasks.name: Design System Components
tasks.description: Create reusable UI component library and design tokens for mobile platforms

tasks.name: Backend Authentication API
tasks.description: Implement OAuth 2.0 authentication service with token refresh and session management

tasks.name: Database Schema Implementation
tasks.description: Design and deploy PostgreSQL schema for user profiles, projects, and activity logs

tasks.name: API Documentation
tasks.description: Complete OpenAPI/Swagger documentation for all REST endpoints and error responses

tasks.name: iOS UI Implementation
tasks.description: Build SwiftUI screens for onboarding, dashboard, and settings modules

tasks.name: Android UI Implementation
tasks.description: Develop Jetpack Compose interfaces for onboarding, dashboard, and settings modules

tasks.name: Integration Testing
tasks.description: Execute end-to-end testing across iOS and Android platforms with backend services

tasks.name: Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize app startup time, memory usage, and network request efficiency

tasks.name: Security Audit
tasks.description: Conduct third-party security assessment and remediate identified vulnerabilities
